title: pulmonaria undulata
intro: Pulmonaria undulata, also known as the wavy-leaved lungwort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Pulmonaria undulata include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Pulmonaria undulata can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or syrup, making it a versatile and valuable addition to various herbal remedies.
